variants.title: Filtrec D141C10AV Pressure Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec D141C10AV. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the D141C10AV provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Pressure Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 78.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 43.2 mm, Length: 209.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 21 bar, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 21 BAR, Seal: Viton

variants.title: Donaldson P566212 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge Dt | Replaces the Filtrec D141C10AV
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P566212 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge Dt | Replaces the Filtrec D141C10AV
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P566212 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge Dt is engineered with advanced depth filtration technology, offering enhanced dirt retention and fluid cleanliness. It ensures optimal performance in high-pressure hydraulic systems, effectively protecting critical components from wear and extending system life. This filters robust construction and superior filtration efficiency make it ideal for demanding applications. Its reliable performance helps minimize maintenance costs and system downtime, ensuring consistent operation under tough conditions.
